coverage.provider_retry_policy: maximum three total attempts per uncached RPC or public-page request; null RPC result and empty page are failures

superseded_query_attempts.resolution: query was not retried; a distinct 4999-block replacement query was attempted once per provider and is recorded separately
superseded_query_attempts.final_coverage_effect: superseded by complete public-page pagination plus canonical receipt reconstruction only if final coverage checks pass

superseded_query_attempts.resolution: query was not retried; target-address USDT coverage switched to complete BscScan public token-page pagination plus exact receipt reconstruction
superseded_query_attempts.final_coverage_effect: none only if terminal page, exact token-contract row multiplicity, canonical receipts and balance checks pass

interrupted_builder_runs.reason: manually interrupted during boundary block lookup after independent audit identified additional fail-closed guards
BscScan empty terminal page used an empty quick-export string; parser stopped fail-closed before receipt reconstruction
first 50-block contract activity shard failed at the three-attempt provider limit; broad activity scan was converted to an explicit coverage gap
